title: podman inspect shows fuzzy matched image information instead of exact matched container information
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

podman inspect honors fuzzy matches against image names before exact matches against container names.


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. podman pull alpine:latest
2. podman tag alpine:latest myrepo/core-someimage:latest
3. podman run --rm -d --name someimage myrepo/core-someimage:latest sleep infinity
4. podman inspect someimage

**Describe the results you received:**

Output of the image myrepo/core-someimage:latest:
```
[
    {
        "Id": "a24bb4013296f61e89ba57005a7b3e52274d8edd3ae2077d04395f806b63d83e",
        "Digest": "sha256:185518070891758909c9f839cf4ca393ee977ac378609f700f60a771a2dfe321",
        "RepoTags": [
            "docker.io/library/alpine:latest",
            "localhost/myrepo/core-someimage:latest"
        ],
        "RepoDigests": [
            "docker.io/library/alpine@sha256:185518070891758909c9f839cf4ca393ee977ac378609f700f60a771a2dfe321",
            "docker.io/library/alpine@sha256:a15790640a6690aa1730c38cf0a440e2aa44aaca9b0e8931a9f2b0d7cc90fd65",
            "localhost/myrepo/core-someimage@sha256:185518070891758909c9f839cf4ca393ee977ac378609f700f60a771a2dfe321",
            "localhost/myrepo/core-someimage@sha256:a15790640a6690aa1730c38cf0a440e2aa44aaca9b0e8931a9f2b0d7cc90fd65"
        ],
<snip>
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Output of the container someimage: (generated from podman inspect -t container someimage)

```
[
    {
        "Id": "a552dbe6929082f6ad3230864ff2aade55c1fa2ebdc602c2d486c5e53f3dcbb3",
        "Created": "2020-06-10T12:14:46.971652475-04:00",
        "Path": "sleep",
        "Args": [
            "infinity"
        ],
        "State": {
            "OciVersion": "1.0.2-dev",
            "Status": "running",
            "Running": true,
            "Paused": false,
<snip>
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

It seems odd to default to images over containers, if there's going to be a default at all.
It also seems odd that this does a fuzzy match at all.  In docker, if I were to do this, docker inspect rwhod would return the container.  If I stop and delete the container, docker inspect rwhod returns an ERROR - no such object.  The fuzzy match was completely expected, let alone preferring it over the exact match.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      2.0.0-dev
API Version:  1
Go Version:   go1.13.3
Git Commit:   723e8234393fba230961bc1214a73ba5d01bbfe1-dirty
Built:        Fri Jun  5 15:10:47 2020
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```
